title: Isla's Colorful Snacks
synopsis: Little Isla discovers different colored foods throughout her day, from red apples to purple grapes. Each page features a new color and food with fun sound effects, creating a predictable pattern that helps babies learn colors while enjoying familiar snacking experiences.

illustration.description: Smiling baby Isla with warm brown skin and soft black curls sits in a sunny yellow high chair, holding a bright red apple with both tiny hands. Her eyes are wide with delight as she takes a bite. The background is soft cream with gentle sunlight streaming through a window.
illustration.alt: Baby Isla eating a red apple in her high chair

illustration.description: Isla sits on a soft blue blanket outdoors, grasping an orange carrot stick. Her father, a tall man with dark skin and kind eyes, sits beside her smiling warmly. Green grass and a few daisies create a peaceful picnic setting with pale blue sky above.
illustration.alt: Isla and her father sharing orange carrots on a picnic blanket

illustration.description: Isla in her high chair holds a peeled yellow banana, some of it squished between her fingers. Her expression shows pure joy and curiosity. Her grandmother, an elderly woman with silver hair and gentle wrinkles, watches lovingly from nearby. The kitchen background has warm peach walls.
illustration.alt: Isla squishing a yellow banana while grandmother watches

illustration.description: Isla sits in her high chair picking up bright green peas one by one with her small fingers. Some peas are scattered on her tray. Her mother, a woman with long black hair and warm smile, encourages her. The background shows a cozy kitchen with soft yellow lighting.
illustration.alt: Isla eating green peas from her high chair tray

illustration.description: Isla sits on a checkered picnic blanket reaching for plump blueberries in a small white bowl. Her older brother, a boy with curly hair and bright smile, sits cross-legged beside her. Tall green trees and blue sky create a serene park setting in the background.
illustration.alt: Isla and her brother sharing blueberries on a picnic

illustration.description: Isla holds a cluster of deep purple grapes, examining them with wonder. She sits in her booster seat at a wooden table. Her aunt, a young woman with short brown hair and freckles, helps guide her hand. The dining room has warm orange walls with family photos.
illustration.alt: Isla exploring purple grapes with her aunt's help

illustration.description: Isla sits in her high chair with a small spoon, eating pink strawberry yogurt from a colorful bowl. Some yogurt dots her cheeks and bib. Her grandfather, a man with gray beard and twinkling eyes, claps his hands encouragingly. Soft morning light fills the bright kitchen.
illustration.alt: Isla eating pink yogurt while grandfather cheers

illustration.description: Isla sits surrounded by all her family members in a warm living room, clapping her tiny hands together with pure joy. A rainbow of the colorful foods from her day creates a gentle arc above them all. Everyone is smiling and clapping along. The room glows with golden sunset light through large windows.
illustration.alt: Isla clapping with her whole family surrounded by colorful foods

metadata.illustrationStyle: Soft, rounded shapes with warm pastel colors. Gentle watercolor feel. Large, friendly faces. High contrast for baby eyes. Simple backgrounds.

questions.question: What color is Isla's apple?
questions.explanation: Isla's apple is red! Red apples go crunch, crunch!

questions.question: What sound do the peas make?
questions.explanation: The green peas go pop, pop when Isla eats them!

questions.question: Who helps Isla with the grapes?
questions.explanation: Isla's aunt helps her with the purple grapes!
